trust_boundary: Dogfood corpus records are static unsafe contract review evidence, not memory-safety proof, not UB-free status, not Miri-clean status, and not a site-execution claim unless an exact witness receipt is attached.

repositories.primary_exercise: Raw pointer reads/writes, Vec::set_len, pointer arithmetic, unsafe impls, owner inference
MaybeUninit, Vec::set_len, raw pointer reads/writes, raw pointer accessor soundness fixes, UTF-8, drop/deallocation cards
SIMD target-feature contracts, pointer arithmetic, unchecked constructors
Large-file syntax scanning, MaybeUninit, pointer arithmetic, unchecked/infallible operations, unsafe-call contract gaps, dedupe
Vec::from_raw_parts, slice construction, ownership-transfer review cards
Unsafe Send/Sync, atomics, raw pointer, ownership-transfer, strict-provenance Miri cfg cards, and atomic pointer state transitions
Unsafe function call contracts, Vec::set_len, zeroed values, pointer operations, socket address layout conversions, and unsafe Send/Sync route cards
Pointer arithmetic, slice construction, str_from_utf8_unchecked, unsafe fn call, and unsafe impl review cards; fresh-crate capstone validation
Pointer arithmetic, unsafe fn call, and unsafe impl review cards; fresh-crate capstone validation
MaybeUninit assume_init, unsafe fn call, unsafe impl, and raw pointer dereference review cards; fresh-crate capstone validation
Unsafe fn call, raw pointer dereference, and unsafe impl review cards including witness-receipt-routing cases; fresh-crate capstone validation
Unsafe fn call, unsafe impl, raw pointer dereference, and pointer arithmetic review cards; fresh-crate capstone validation
FFI/extern unsafe fn call and cfg-gated platform-branch review cards; control-plane validation
SIMD target_feature unsafe fn call and intrinsic review cards; control-plane validation
Raw pointer dereference, transmute, and byte-cast review cards; control-plane validation

recorded_outcomes.proof_action: Keep the target_feature contract evidence as reviewability movement; attach an exact external witness receipt before treating the route as witnessed evidence.
recorded_outcomes.claim_boundary: Static unsafe contract review saved-outcome movement only; not calibrated precision or recall, not witness execution, not site execution evidence, not policy readiness, not memory-safety proof, not UB-free status, not Miri-clean status, and not a site-execution claim unless a matching witness receipt says so.
recorded_outcomes.notes: Documented target_feature declarations moved from guard_missing to guarded_unwitnessed without claiming target-feature availability, site execution, or soundness.

real_crate_judgment_sample.claim_boundary: Selected real-crate manual usefulness samples only from static unsafe contract review; not calibrated precision or recall, not witness execution, not site execution evidence, not policy readiness, not a proof of memory safety, not UB-free status, and not a Miri result.

control_targets.primary_exercise: Quiet no-card output and no all-clear wording for a fixture-level false-positive control.
Committed Bun manual candidates remain manual/advisory and project through first-pr manual-candidate handoff artifacts, including the manual repair queue sidecar.

limitations: The corpus is selected and capped, not ecosystem-wide calibration.
Fixture controls are indexed separately from real-crate repository coverage.
Saved-output artifacts are local_untracked under target/dogfood-work.
Outcome comparison reads saved snapshots only and does not rerun analysis.
Dogfood records do not execute witness tools or make policy decisions.
